examples: She put out fresh towels for the guests.
The firefighters put out the blaze.
Put out your campfire before leaving.
He put out the recycling bins.
They put out chairs for the event.
She put out the candle before sleeping.
Put out the welcome mat for visitors.
They put out the fire quickly.
Put out the trash before morning.
example_translate: Она выложила свежие полотенца для гостей.
put out.synonyms:
Тушить (огонь, сигарету) - extinguish, quench
Выкладывать, выставлять (наружу) - place outside, set out
